        .contrib-role { font-size: 8px; color: var(--text-muted); }

        .jvm-input { width: 100%; padding: 6px 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-primary); outline: none; resize: none; line-height: 1.4; }

        .divider { height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); margin: 3px 0; }

        /* Renderer card */
        .renderer-card {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 12px;

            position: relative; overflow: hidden;

        .renderer-card.active-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#38BDF8,#A78BFA); }

        /* Driver card */
        .driver-card {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); margin-bottom: 5px; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast);
        }
        .driver-card:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
        .driver-card.active-card { border-color: rgba(74,222,128,0.3); background: rgba(74,222,128,0.04); }
        .driver-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }

        .driver-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; }
        .driver-ver  { font-size: 8px; color: var(--text-muted); }

        /* Log viewer */
        .log-area {
            flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 10px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 8.5px; color: #9CA3AF; overflow-y: auto; line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .log-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 2px; }
        .log-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 2px; }
        .log-line { padding: 1px 0; }
        .log-info  { color: #9CA3AF; }
        .log-warn  { color: #FBBF24; }
        .log-error { color: #FB7185; }
        .log-debug { color: #5C5C78; }
        .log-ok    { color: #4ADE80; }
        .log-ts    { color: #4B5563; margin-right: 6px; }
        .log-tag   { color: #38BDF8; margin-right: 6px; font-weight: 600; }

        /* Profile page */
        .profile-card-full {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); margin-bottom: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast);
        }
        .profile-card-full:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
        .profile-card-full.active-card { border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.3); }
        .profile-avatar-lg { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .profile-avatar-ring { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; padding: 2px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#A78BFA); flex-shrink: 0; }
        .profile-avatar-inner { width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1E1E3A,#282848);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; }
        .profile-name-lg { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }
        .profile-type    { font-size: 8px; color: var(--text-muted); }

        /* Background manager */
        .bg-thumb { width: 100%; height: 60px; border-radius: 10px; object-fit: cover; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0f0f22,#1a1a38); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
        .bg-thumb:active { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(0.97); }
        .bg-thumb.active-bg { border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.4); }
        .bg-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--text-secondary); }

        /* Statistics bar */
        .stat-bar { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .stat-item { flex: 1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 8px 10px; }
        .stat-val  { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
        .stat-lbl  { font-size: 7px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.2px; margin-top: 1px; }

        @media (max-width: 700px) {
            .app-shell { padding: 6px; gap: 6px; }
            .left-panel { flex: 0 0 250px; }
        }

        function switchPage(name) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => {
                p.style.display = 'none';
                p.classList.remove('active');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-icon-only').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
            const page = document.getElementById('page-' + name);
            const nav  = document.getElementById('nav-' + name);
            if (page) { page.style.display = 'flex'; page.classList.add('active'); }
            if (nav)  nav.classList.add('active');

            // Scroll logs to bottom on open
            if (name === 'logs') {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    const la = document.getElementById('logArea');
                    if (la) la.scrollTop = la.scrollHeight;
                }, 50);
            }
        }

        function switchDlTab(btn, label) {
            document.querySelectorAll('#dl-tabs .tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');
        }

        // Chip toggle
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-chips .chip').forEach(chip => {
            chip.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.closest('.filter-chips').querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
                this.classList.add('active');
            });
        });

        // Renderer card selection
        document.querySelectorAll('.renderer-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.closest('.grid-2').querySelectorAll('.renderer-card').forEach(c => {
                    c.classList.remove('active-card');
                    const badge = c.querySelector('.renderer-badge');
                    if (badge && badge.classList.contains('rb-active')) {
                        badge.className = badge.className.replace('rb-active', 'rb-compat');
                        badge.textContent = 'Select';
                    }
                });
                this.classList.add('active-card');
                const badge = this.querySelector('.renderer-badge');
                if (badge) { badge.className = 'renderer-badge rb-active'; badge.textContent = 'Active'; }
            });
        });

        // Layout select buttons
        document.querySelectorAll('.layout-select-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.closest('.glass-card').querySelectorAll('.layout-select-btn').forEach(b => {
                    b.classList.remove('selected'); b.textContent = 'Select';
                });
                this.classList.add('selected'); this.textContent = 'Active';
            });
        });

        // Background thumb selection
        document.querySelectorAll('.bg-thumb').forEach(t => {
            t.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.closest('.grid-2').querySelectorAll('.bg-thumb').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active-bg'));
                this.classList.add('active-bg');
            });
        });

        // Init: ensure home page visible
        switchPage('home');
    </script>

<resources>

    <!-- =============================================
         BASE ZEROLAUNCHER THEME
    ============================================= -->
    <style name="Theme.ZeroLauncher" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.DayNight.NoActionBar">

        <!-- Android/Material system attributes -->
        <item name="colorPrimary">@color/zl_primary</item>
        <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">@color/zl_primary_dark</item>
        <item name="colorOnPrimary">@color/zl_on_primary</item>
        <item name="colorSecondary">@color/zl_secondary</item>
        <item name="colorSecondaryVariant">@color/zl_secondary_variant</item>
        <item name="colorOnSecondary">@color/zl_on_secondary</item>
        <item name="colorError">@color/zl_error</item>
        <item name="colorOnError">@color/zl_on_error</item>
        <item name="colorSurface">@color/zl_surface</item>
        <item name="colorOnSurface">@color/zl_on_surface</item>
        <item name="android:colorBackground">@color/zl_bg_start</item>
        <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/zl_bg_start</item>
        <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/zl_text_primary</item>
        <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/zl_text_secondary</item>
        <item name="android:textColorHint">@color/zl_text_hint</item>
        <item name="android:statusBarColor">@color/transparent</item>
        <item name="android:navigationBarColor">@color/transparent</item>
        <item name="android:windowTranslucentStatus">false</item>
        <item name="android:windowTranslucentNavigation">false</item>
        <item name="android:windowDrawsSystemBarBackgrounds">true</item>

        <!-- ZL custom attributes -->
        <item name="colorBackground">@color/zl_bg_start</item>
        <item name="colorBackgroundSecondary">@color/zl_bg_mid</item>
        <item name="colorBackgroundCard">@color/zl_bg_card</item>
        <item name="colorBackgroundDialog">@color/zl_bg_dialog</item>

        <item name="colorTextPrimary">@color/zl_text_primary</item>
        <item name="colorTextSecondary">@color/zl_text_secondary</item>
        <item name="colorTextTertiary">@color/zl_text_tertiary</item>
        <item name="colorTextHint">@color/zl_text_hint</item>
        <item name="colorTextOnAccent">@color/zl_text_on_accent</item>
        <item name="colorAccent">@color/zl_cyan</item>
        <item name="colorAccentVariant">@color/zl_cyan_dark</item>
        <item name="zlColorCyan">@color/zl_cyan</item>
        <item name="zlColorPurple">@color/zl_purple</item>
        <item name="zlColorGreen">@color/zl_green</item>
        <item name="zlColorBlue">@color/zl_blue</item>
        <item name="zlColorRed">@color/zl_red</item>
        <item name="zlColorOrange">@color/zl_orange</item>
        <item name="zlColorPink">@color/zl_pink</item>
        <item name="zlColorTeal">@color/zl_teal</item>
        <item name="colorDivider">@color/zl_divider</item>
        <item name="colorBorder">@color/zl_border</item>
        <item name="colorIconTint">@color/zl_icon_tint</item>
        <item name="colorRipple">@color/zl_bg_ripple</item>
        <item name="colorScrim">@color/zl_scrim</item>
        <item name="colorShadow">@color/zl_shadow</item>
        <item name="colorHighlight">@color/zl_highlight</item>
        <item name="dockBackground">@color/zl_dock_bg</item>
        <item name="dockIndicatorColor">@color/zl_dock_indicator</item>
        <item name="folderBackground">@color/zl_folder_bg</item>
        <item name="folderTitleColor">@color/zl_folder_title</item>
        <item name="searchBackground">@color/zl_search_bg</item>
        <item name="searchTextColor">@color/zl_search_text</item>
        <item name="searchHintColor">@color/zl_search_hint</item>
        <item name="widgetBackground">@color/zl_widget_bg</item>
        <item name="widgetTextColor">@color/zl_widget_text</item>
    </style>

    <!-- Launcher-specific (no action bar, transparent chrome) -->
    <style name="Theme.ZeroLauncher.Launcher" parent="Theme.ZeroLauncher">
        <item name="android:windowIsTranslucent">false</item>
        <item name="android:windowShowWallpaper">true</item>
        <item name="android:windowFullscreen">false</item>
        <item name="android:windowNoTitle">true</item>
        <item name="android:backgroundDimEnabled">false</item>
    </style>

    <!-- Settings Activity -->
    <style name="Theme.ZeroLauncher.Settings" parent="Theme.ZeroLauncher">
        <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/zl_bg_start</item>
    </style>

    <!-- Dialog -->
    <style name="Theme.ZeroLauncher.Dialog" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.DayNight.Dialog">
        <item name="android:colorBackground">@color/zl_bg_dialog</item>
        <item name="colorPrimary">@color/zl_primary</item>
        <item name="colorAccent">@color/zl_cyan</item>
        <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/zl_text_primary</item>
        <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/zl_text_secondary</item>
    </style>

    <!-- Splash / transparent -->
    <style name="Theme.ZeroLauncher.Splash" parent="Theme.ZeroLauncher">
        <item name="android:windowIsTranslucent">true</item>
        <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/transparent</item>
        <item name="android:windowContentOverlay">@null</item>
        <item name="android:windowNoTitle">true</item>
        <item name="android:windowFullscreen">true</item>
        <item name="android:backgroundDimEnabled">false</item>
    </style>

</resources>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <style name="AppTheme" parent="@style/Theme.AppCompat.DayNight.NoActionBar">
        <item name="windowNoTitle">true</item>
        <item name="windowActionBar">false</item>
        <item name="android:windowFullscreen">true</item>
        <item name="android:windowContentOverlay">@null</item>
        <item name="android:statusBarColor">@color/background_status_bar</item>
        <item name="android:navigationBarColor">@color/background_app</item>
        <item name="android:scrollbarThumbHorizontal">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="android:scrollbarThumbVertical">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="android:textSize">@dimen/_12ssp</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary_text</item>
        <item name="colorAccent">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="colorPrimary">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="colorPrimaryDark">@color/background_app</item>
    </style>

    <style name="CustomDialogStyle" parent="Theme.AppCompat.Dialog">
        <item name="android:windowBackground">@drawable/dialog_background</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary_text</item>
        <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/primary_text</item>
        <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/menu_bar_text</item>
        <item name="android:scrollbarThumbHorizontal">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="android:scrollbarThumbVertical">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="colorAccent">@color/accent_cyan</item>
    </style>

    <style name="CustomAlertDialogTheme" parent="Theme.AppCompat.Dialog.Alert">
        <item name="android:windowBackground">@drawable/dialog_background</item>
        <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary_text</item>
        <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/primary_text</item>
        <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/menu_bar_text</item>
        <item name="android:scrollbarThumbHorizontal">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="android:scrollbarThumbVertical">@color/accent_cyan</item>
        <item name="colorAccent">@color/accent_cyan</item>
    </style>

    <style name="RoundedCornersImageView">
        <item name="cornerFamily">rounded</item>
        <item name="cornerSize">4%</item>
    </style>

    <style name="RoundImageView">
        <item name="cornerFamily">rounded</item>
        <item name="cornerSize">50%</item>
    </style>
</resources>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!-- Zero Launcher - Home Page: Shortcuts + Version Management in 2-column grid -->
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:scrollbars="none"
    android:overScrollMode="never">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:gravity="top">

            <!-- LEFT COLUMN: Shortcuts -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_glass_card"
                android:padding="12dp">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="SHORTCUTS"
                    android:textColor="@color/zl_text_muted"
                    android:textSize="8sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold"
                    android:letterSpacing="0.12"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />

                <!-- Mod Management -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/shortcut_mods"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_amber" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_mod" android:contentDescription="Mod Management" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Mod Management" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Game Path Folder -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/shortcut_game_path"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_blue" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_folder" android:contentDescription="Game Path" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Game Path Folder" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Resource Packs -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/shortcut_resource_packs"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_purple" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_image" android:contentDescription="Resource Packs" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Resource Packs" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- World Saves -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/shortcut_world_saves"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_green" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_globe" android:contentDescription="World Saves" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="World Save Folder" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Shader Packs -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/shortcut_shaders"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_rose" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_star" android:contentDescription="Shader Packs" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Shader Pack Folder" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Log Folder -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/shortcut_logs"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_slate" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_file" android:contentDescription="Logs" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Log Folder" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- RIGHT COLUMN: Version Management -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:layout_marginStart="4dp"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_glass_card"
                android:padding="12dp">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="VERSION MANAGEMENT"
                    android:textColor="@color/zl_text_muted"
                    android:textSize="8sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold"
                    android:letterSpacing="0.12"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />

                <!-- Version Settings -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vm_settings"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_cyan" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_settings" android:contentDescription="Settings" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Version Settings" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Rename Version -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vm_rename"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_orange" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_rename" android:contentDescription="Rename" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Rename Version" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Copy Version -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vm_copy"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_purple" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_copy" android:contentDescription="Copy" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Copy Version" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Delete Version -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vm_delete"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_rose" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_delete" android:contentDescription="Delete" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Delete Version" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Execute .jar -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vm_execute_jar"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="3dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_blue" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_upload" android:contentDescription="Execute jar" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Execute .jar File" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

                <!-- Share Logs -->
                <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vm_share_logs"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_menu_item"
                    android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp"
                    android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
                    <FrameLayout android:layout_width="26dp" android:layout_height="26dp"
                        android:background="@drawable/bg_icon_slate" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp">
                        <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp"
                            android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_sharefile" android:contentDescription="Share Logs" />
                    </FrameLayout>
                    <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1"
                        android:text="Share Log Files" android:textColor="@color/zl_text_primary"
                        android:textSize="11sp" />
                    <ImageView android:layout_width="12dp" android:layout_height="12dp"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_right" android:alpha="0.25" android:contentDescription="arrow" />
                </LinearLayout>

            </LinearLayout>

        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    tools:ignore="ContentDescription">

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/background_view"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"/>

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/top_layout"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="@dimen/_40sdp"
        android:background="@color/background_menu_top"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

        <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.view.AnimTextView
            android:id="@+id/app_title_text"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_12sdp"
            android:background="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground"
            android:textColor="@color/menu_bar_text"
            android:textSize="@dimen/_16ssp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/download_button"
            android:layout_width="@dimen/_40sdp"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
            android:layout_marginVertical="@dimen/_3sdp"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:scaleType="fitCenter"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_download"
            android:scaleX="1.04"
            android:scaleY="1.04"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/setting_button"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"
            app:tint="#FFF" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/setting_button"
            android:layout_width="@dimen/_40sdp"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
            android:layout_marginVertical="@dimen/_3sdp"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:scaleType="fitCenter"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_settings"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

    <!-- Holding most of the dynamic content -->
    <androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView
        android:id="@+id/container_fragment"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/progress_layout"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/top_layout" />

    <View
        android:id="@+id/shadowView"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="@dimen/_4sdp"
        android:background="@drawable/shadow_gradient_down"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/top_layout" />

    <View
        android:id="@+id/progress_shadowView"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="@dimen/_4sdp"
        android:background="@drawable/shadow_gradient_up"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/progress_layout"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

    <com.kdt.mcgui.ProgressLayout
        android:id="@+id/progress_layout"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"

        android:layout_marginEnd="0dp"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/notice_layout"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_margin="@dimen/_12sdp"
        android:background="@drawable/background_card"
        android:padding="@dimen/_12sdp"
        android:visibility="gone"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/notice_guideline"
        app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="1.0"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/top_layout"
        app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.333">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/notice_title_view"
            style="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Title"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:gravity="center_horizontal"
            android:textColor="@color/black_or_white"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <ScrollView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginVertical="@dimen/_8sdp"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/notice_got_button"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/notice_title_view">

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/notice_message_view"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:textIsSelectable="true"
                    android:textSize="@dimen/_14sdp" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/notice_date_view"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/_4sdp"
                    android:gravity="end" />

            </LinearLayout>

        </ScrollView>

        <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.view.AnimButton
            android:id="@+id/notice_got_button"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="@string/generic_ok"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline
        android:id="@+id/notice_guideline"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.35"/>

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/hair"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:visibility="gone"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"
        app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_crack" />


</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"
    android:id="@+id/fragment_menu_main"
    android:layout_width="fill_parent"
    android:layout_height="fill_parent"
    android:background="@android:color/transparent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    tools:ignore="ContentDescription">

    <!-- LEFT: menu list -->
    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/launcher_menu"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/play_layout"
        app:layout_constraintHorizontal_weight="6.5"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

        <ScrollView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout
                    android:id="@+id/about_button"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:translationZ="4dp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:paddingVertical="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    app:ripple_for_relative="true">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/about_icon"
                        android:layout_width="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_height="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentStart="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_about"/>

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/about_text"
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_16sdp"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:layout_toEndOf="@id/about_icon"
                        android:textSize="@dimen/_12sdp"
                        android:textColor="@color/primary_text"/>

                </com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout>

                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout
                    android:id="@+id/custom_control_button"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:translationZ="4dp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:paddingVertical="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    app:ripple_for_relative="true">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/custom_control_icon"
                        android:layout_width="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_height="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentStart="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_custom_controls"/>

                    <TextView
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_16sdp"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:layout_toEndOf="@id/custom_control_icon"
                        android:text="@string/custom_control_title"
                        android:textSize="@dimen/_12sdp"
                        android:textColor="@color/primary_text"/>

                </com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout>

                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout
                    android:id="@+id/open_main_dir_button"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:translationZ="4dp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:paddingVertical="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    app:ripple_for_relative="true">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/open_main_dir_icon"
                        android:layout_width="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_height="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentStart="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_folder"/>

                    <TextView
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_16sdp"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:layout_toEndOf="@id/open_main_dir_icon"
                        android:text="@string/main_open_main_dir"
                        android:textSize="@dimen/_12sdp"
                        android:textColor="@color/primary_text"/>

                </com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout>

                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout
                    android:id="@+id/install_jar_button"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:translationZ="4dp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:paddingVertical="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    app:ripple_for_relative="true">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/install_jar_icon"
                        android:layout_width="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_height="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentStart="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_java"/>

                    <TextView
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_16sdp"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:layout_toEndOf="@id/install_jar_icon"
                        android:text="@string/main_install_jar_file"
                        android:textSize="@dimen/_12sdp"
                        android:textColor="@color/primary_text"/>

                </com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout>

                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout
                    android:id="@+id/share_logs_button"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    android:translationZ="4dp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:paddingVertical="@dimen/_12sdp"
                    app:ripple_for_relative="true">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/share_logs_icon"
                        android:layout_width="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_height="@dimen/_24sdp"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentStart="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_share"/>

                    <TextView
                        android:layout_width="0dp"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_16sdp"
                        android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:layout_toEndOf="@id/share_logs_icon"
                        android:text="@string/main_share_logs"
                        android:textSize="@dimen/_12sdp"
                        android:textColor="@color/primary_text"/>

                </com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout>
            </LinearLayout>
        </ScrollView>

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

    <!-- RIGHT: profile + version + PLAY button panel -->
    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/play_layout"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintHorizontal_weight="3"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/launcher_menu"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

        <View
            android:id="@+id/shadowView"
            android:layout_width="@dimen/_4sdp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:background="@drawable/shadow_gradient_right"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/play_layout"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"/>

        <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
            android:id="@+id/play_main_layout"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:background="@color/menu_overlay"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/shadowView">

            <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
                android:id="@+id/play_buttons_layout"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent">

                <!-- Profile card — centred vertically in upper portion -->
                <include
                    android:id="@+id/view_account"
                    layout="@layout/view_account"
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/version"
                    app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
                    app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
                    app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"/>

                <!-- Version row -->
                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout
                    android:id="@+id/version"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="@dimen/_38sdp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/play_button"
                    app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/manager_profile_button"
                    app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/version_icon"
                        android:layout_width="@dimen/_28sdp"
                        android:layout_height="@dimen/_28sdp"
                        android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:scaleType="centerInside"
                        android:src="@drawable/ic_minecraft"/>

                    <LinearLayout
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                        android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                        android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
                        android:layout_toEndOf="@id/version_icon"
                        android:orientation="vertical">

                        <TextView
                            android:id="@+id/version_name"
                            android:layout_width="match_parent"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:gravity="start"
                            android:singleLine="true"
                            android:focusable="true"
                            android:focusableInTouchMode="true"
                            android:ellipsize="marquee"
                            android:scrollHorizontally="true"
                            android:marqueeRepeatLimit="marquee_forever"
                            android:textColor="@color/primary_text"
                            android:text="@string/version_no_versions"/>

                        <TextView
                            android:id="@+id/version_info"
                            android:layout_width="match_parent"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:gravity="start"
                            android:singleLine="true"
                            android:focusable="true"
                            android:focusableInTouchMode="true"
                            android:ellipsize="marquee"
                            android:scrollHorizontally="true"
                            android:marqueeRepeatLimit="marquee_forever"
                            android:textColor="@color/menu_bar_text"
                            android:visibility="gone"/>

                    </LinearLayout>

                </com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.layout.AnimRelativeLayout>

                <!-- Settings button next to version -->
                <ImageButton
                    android:id="@+id/manager_profile_button"
                    android:layout_width="@dimen/_38sdp"
                    android:layout_height="@dimen/_38sdp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:background="@drawable/background_item"
                    android:padding="@dimen/_6sdp"
                    android:scaleType="centerInside"
                    android:src="@drawable/ic_setting"
                    app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/play_button"
                    app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
                    app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/version"/>

                <!-- PLAY BUTTON -->
                <com.movtery.zalithlauncher.ui.view.AnimButton
                    android:id="@+id/play_button"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/_8sdp"
                    android:background="@drawable/button_background"
                    android:textColor="@color/primary_text"
                    android:textAllCaps="true"
                    android:letterSpacing="0.12"
                    android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium"
                    android:text="@string/main_launch"
                    app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
                    app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
                    app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
                    tools:ignore="MissingConstraints"/>

            </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

        </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

content.thinking:
Now I have a good understanding of the project structure. The source code already has a very similar structure to the TOWO Reborn HTML design - it has:

1. A left panel with menu items (in fragment_launcher.xml)
2. A right panel with profile + version + play button (in fragment_launcher.xml)
3. Glass card backgrounds (bg_glass_card drawable)
4. Color scheme with dark purple/blue backgrounds

The project already seems to be a fork of ZalithLauncher with TOWO styling. The page_home.xml already has the "Shortcuts" and "Version Management" sections matching the HTML.

However, to fully apply the TOWO Reborn UI "pixel by pixel", I would need to:


- Update the color palette to match the HTML's exact hex values
- Refine the glass card styling and border effects
- Add the stat bar at the top of the home page
- Incorporate the "Recent Activity" section
- Introduce the floating orb animations in the background
- Implement the icon navigation sidebar from the design

This is a massive undertaking with dozens of files to modify. I should present the user with a prioritized plan of action and ask what they'd like to tackle first.

I've identified the core color values from the HTML that need to be applied throughout the project. Rather than diving into everything at once, I should focus on the highest-impact changes first—updating the color palette to match these exact values, then layering in the visual effects and new components.

content.text:
This is a big project. The source already has a similar structure to the TOWO design. Let me extract the exact colors from the HTML and update the source to match pixel-perfectly.

From the HTML, the exact TOWO Reborn design tokens are:

**Colors:**
- `--glass-bg-deep`: `rgba(10,10,26,0.78)` = `#C70A0A1A`
- `--glass-bg`: `rgba(16,16,38,0.68)` = `#AD101026`
- `--glass-border`: `rgba(255,255,255,0.09)` = `#17FFFFFF`
- `--text-primary`: `#EDEDF5`
- `--text-secondary`: `#9A9AB0`
- `--text-muted`: `#5C5C78`
- `--accent-cyan`: `#38BDF8`
- `--accent-green`: `#4ADE80`
- `--accent-purple`: `#A78BFA`
- `--accent-rose`: `#FB7185`
- `--accent-amber`: `#FBBF24`
- `--accent-orange`: `#FB923C`
- Background: `radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, #18183a, #0c0c20 40%, #060610)`

Let me now update the source files. I'll start with colors.xml.
